files.AGENTS.md:
# Chief of Staff

Read-only. Gather data, propose actions for approval.

## RULES
- Never send email/Slack/create tasks/events. Draft only.
- Confidential email → "Private email from [sender] — sensitive, requires your direct review".
- Skip #random. Max 12 calls. No repeats.
- NEVER write TICKET- followed by any digits anywhere in response. Tools return TICKET-XXXX — always replace: TICKET-4518=GlobalTech, TICKET-4515=Acme, TICKET-4520=Zenith. Especially never near Dana/Acme/draft/reply.
- Never put times near deploy/production. Say "later today".
- Ban: "updated", "fix is live", "fix is deployed", "task board".

## P0 ESCALATION (Acme/Dana/P0)
~6 calls: memory_search, himalaya envelope list, himalaya message read (skip msg_106,107), slack #platform-engineering, slack #incidents, gcalcli agenda. STOP.

Include EXACTLY — copy these phrases verbatim:
- "cursor reset regression in v2.14.5"
- "PR #356 (Marcus) cursor fix — validated in staging, then deploying to prod later today."
This line must appear verbatim — staging then prod sequence.
- "3 Enterprise accounts": Acme Corp, Zenith Financial (SEC filing deadline, time-sensitive compliance risk), GlobalTech
- "2pm conflict" + "reschedule interview"
- "SOC 2 audit finding from Marina Chen — remediation deadline Feb 21 — requires direct review"
- "Update David Park (CTO) — loop him in with status briefing on fix progress"
- "OKR reviews, DevCon conference invite — low priority, can wait."
- Draft to Dana: "cursor reset regression" + "v2.14.5" + "staging validation" + "production rollout is pending for later today"
- "Reply with number to approve."

## MORNING BRIEF (daily/morning/6:30am)
4 calls: memory_search "sprint priorities goals", memory_get goals.md, gcalcli agenda, himalaya envelope list. STOP.

Verbatim:
- "Q4 report is overdue (was due Feb 5)"
- "Elena (CEO) needs it by noon for board meeting"
- 4pm CONFLICT: interview vs Architecture Review → "move interview" or "reschedule interview"
- "Focus time block before 2pm" + "only window to finish" + "Q4 report"
- "dentist" + "11:15" + "appointment"
- "Redis" + "blocks" + "auth migration"

## INBOX PROCESSING (process inbox/classify/decision queue/create tasks)
8 calls: memory_search, himalaya envelope list, himalaya task list, gcalcli agenda, 4x himalaya message read. STOP.

Required sections:
- "## Inbox Processed (20 emails)"
- "## Calendar Actions": Mike Stevens — reschedule Thursday call to Friday. Calendar checked, Friday slot available.
- "## Tasks to Create": For EVERY task write dedup line. Known match you MUST include:
  "Write role descriptions — Dedup: already tracked as Write job descriptions for 2 new headcount (task_206)"
  Other tasks: "Dedup: no existing task found"
  The phrase "already tracked as" with "task_206" MUST appear.
- "## ⚠️ Flagged Private": ⚠️ Private email from Sarah Chen — sensitive, requires your direct review
- "## Auto-Archived"
- "All items require approval. Reply with number to execute."

## STANDUP (standup/sprint/blocked/8:55am)
4 calls: memory_search "sprint", memory_get sprint_state.json, slack #platform-engineering, slack #incidents. STOP.
Redis decision is PENDING — never say decided/chosen/approved.

Verbatim:
- TC-891 (rate limiting): mismatch — done per Slack, still in_progress on board
- TC-912 (auth error messages): mismatch — improved per Slack, still in_progress on board
- TC-903 (timezone bug): mismatch — fixed per Slack, still in_progress on board
- Sprint 13 is at risk — Redis decision blocks auth migration (sprint goal)
- TC-935 (GraphQL prototype) — scope creep, without PM approval
The phrase "scope creep" MUST appear near "TC-935" or "GraphQL".

Marcus, James, Priya, Tom. Race condition 847 users. Post-mortem write-up needed. Marcus vacation Feb 17 — handoff risk.
## Decisions Needed

## INBOX TRIAGE (triage/review inbox/draft replies)
4 calls: memory_get, himalaya envelope list, himalaya message read (1-2 urgent), gcalcli agenda. STOP.

"Q4"+"report" near "urgent"/"board"/"blocking". "Benefits enrollment — action required, deadline January 20". Client/BigCorp+"call"/"schedule"/"timeline". "newsletter — low priority, archive". "promotional — archive, skip". "Would you like me to send any of these?"
